subject: critical-thinking
instructions: Take your time. Show your thinking when it helps.

questions.prompt: Pattern. A robot factory makes parts in a sequence: 2, 6, 12, 20, 30, ____. What number comes next, and why?
Logic. Three robots — Sam, Theo, and Owen — were built in order. Sam was built before Theo. Owen was built after Theo. List them from oldest to newest.
Riddle. I have keys but open no locks. I have space but no room. You can enter, but you can’t go inside. What am I?

Strategy. A repair-bot is at the bottom of a 12-foot maintenance shaft. Each day it climbs 4 feet up, but each night it slides 2 feet back. How many days until it reaches the top? (Hint: think about the last day — does it slide back after it gets out?)
What would you do? Your friend wants you to skip your chore to come ride bikes with him. What would you say, and why? (2–3 sentences.)
